title: U.S. Department of Transportation Launches Climate Action Strategy Playbook to Help Communities Across America Reduce Emissions
content: The U.S. Department of Transportation has released the "Climate Strategies That Work" playbook, featuring 28 research-based strategies to help State, Tribal, city, and local governments reduce carbon emissions and build sustainable transportation systems. Aligned with the U.S. National Blueprint for Transportation Decarbonization, the playbook covers solutions like active transportation, EVs, and freight efficiency, offering case studies, funding guidance, and insights on achieving greenhouse gas reductions, economic growth, and safety. It aims to empower local leaders with data-driven tools for creating efficient, clean, and accessible transportation systems.
author: Analysts Account
